prompt: A narrow, weathered corridor stretches into the distance, flanked by a long row of rusted metal barriers. The barriers, showing signs of age and neglect, stand on a cracked concrete floor where small patches of green moss and weeds have taken root. The wall beside them is heavily damaged, with large sections of peeling paint and deep fissures revealing the underlying material. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts, revealing more of the decaying corridor and the repeating pattern of the barriers. The scene conveys a sense of abandonment and quiet decay, with the muted colors and broken surfaces emphasizing a forgotten space.
